question: How much does fencing cost?
answer: Our standard timber paling fencing starts from $80 per metre. Colorbond fencing typically ranges from $100–$140 per metre depending on height, ground conditions, and access. Pool fencing, gates, and rural fencing are quoted individually because every site is different. Every quote is free — give us a call or fill in the contact form and we'll come out to measure and provide a fixed price.
